objective: introduce a generation layer that converts minimal human input into structured spec artifacts without modifying runtime logic
confirmed_facts: manual creation of session JSON and acceptance YAML is a bottleneck
existing system already has strong execution and validation layers
spec creation is repetitive and structurally predictable
interpretation: introducing a generation layer reduces human workload
spec generation can be standardized via templates and constraints
runtime integration should be deferred to avoid scope expansion
risks: generated specs may include incorrect scope definitions
acceptance criteria may become invalid if constraints are not enforced
over-automation without review may introduce hidden defects
open_issues: spec reviewer layer is not yet implemented
no automated validation of generated specs
integration with run_session pipeline is not defined
next_actions: define validation rules for generated specs
evaluate integration strategy with orchestration pipeline

final_judgement.reason: generation layer minimum design templates are established as docs-only artifacts, covering input sheet, builder prompt, and output contract
